visual_enhancers.motifs: subtle paisley, mango, lotus background motifs, rangoli accents

bottom_tab_bar.layout: fixed bottom, flex-row, space-around, py-2, shadow-top

onboarding.layout: Full screen carousel, flex-col, center aligned content
onboarding.elements: 3-slide welcome, Child profile form (name, age, weight, height, allergies, region, language)
onboarding.actions: Next button, Skip button, Final submit to local storage

dashboard.elements: Mother greeting header, Child's growth snapshot card, Today's meal card, Tip of the day, Seasonal/festival banner

recipes_browser.layout: Search bar + Filters + Grid/List of recipe cards
recipes_browser.elements: Filter by meal type/region/age, Recipe card (Image, Title, Ayurvedic/Scientific Badges, Time/Prep info)

recipe_detail.elements: Title, Badges, Nutritional info, Ingredients list, Steps list, Back button

meal_planner.layout: Horizontal scrollable days + vertical meals list
meal_planner.elements: 7-day swipeable view, Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner slots, AI Generate button, Shopping list toggle

profile.elements: Mother + child profile details, Growth tracker graph, Language toggle (EN/HI/TE)

mother_child.description: Indian mother feeding child in kitchen

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS or React Native stylesheets adhering to these color tokens and spacing metrics.
Ensure headings use Noto Serif Display or an equivalent serif fallback if custom fonts aren't loaded immediately.
Ensure body font uses Poppins or an equivalent sans-serif fallback.
Implement bottom tab navigation utilizing icons (e.g. lucide-react-native) with 2px stroke weight.
Apply 'soft_warm' shadow to all elevated cards, utilizing a subtle brown tint instead of generic gray/black.
Ensure the background color #F4E4C1 (Saffron Cream) is set as the main app background to evoke warmth.
Add Ayurvedic and Scientific validation badges strictly following the specified colors (#7BA474 and #4B0082).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
